/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/app/AppController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/protocol/TextProtocolCodec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/protocol/TextMessageParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/AcquisitionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/ConnectionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/ExportService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/PlotService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/core/services/ProtocolSessionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/csv/CsvExporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/logging/ConsoleLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/python/PythonPlotEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/serial/SerialPortStub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/infrastructure/serial/PosixSerialPort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/batView.dir/src/ui/viewmodels/MainViewModel.cpp.o -o batView
